name: Marginal Oil and Gas Well Production Credit 5-Year Carryback

eligibility.description: Taxpayers producing oil or gas from marginal wells who have unused credits under Section 45I.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides an extended 5-year carryback period (instead of 1 year) and a 25-year carryforward for unused marginal oil and gas well production credits.
